hyomen.name: Prodigal Mind
hyomen.effect: Cognitive adaptability; broad skill application across diverse fields

hyomen.name: Indecisive Body
hyomen.effect: Physical versatility; no locked body configuration — adapts to any role

hyomen.name: Indomitable Will
hyomen.effect: Mental resilience; resistance to psychic and emotional compulsion

hyomen.name: Peak Evolution
hyomen.effect: Access to the widest range of Backgrounds and Asymmetry paths of any species

voaulton.name: Robotic Integration
voaulton.effect: Natural affinity for machine-bonding and technological augmentation

voaulton.name: Adaptive Analysis
voaulton.effect: Rapid environmental and tactical threat assessment

voaulton.name: Energetic Synergy
voaulton.effect: Synchronize personal energy output with external power systems

mirga.name: Perfect Mimicry
mirga.effect: Flawless replication of observed biological and physical traits

mirga.name: Mimetic Adaptation
mirga.effect: Automatically adapt mimicked form in response to environmental pressures

mirga.name: Illusory Disguise
mirga.effect: Project false appearances beyond physical mimicry — includes aura, energy signature, and perceived identity

mirga.name: Emotional Mimicry
mirga.effect: Mirror and broadcast the emotional states of nearby creatures; can stabilize or destabilize group morale

insectoid.name: Regenerative Limbs
insectoid.effect: Lost or damaged limbs regrow over time; rate scales with health state

insectoid.name: Eyeless
insectoid.effect: Navigate through non-visual sensory systems (vibration, electromagnetic, chemical); immune to vision-based attacks and illusions

insectoid.name: Reflexive Assurance
insectoid.effect: Automatic reaction to perceived threats without conscious deliberation

insectoid.name: Peak Evolution
insectoid.effect: Access to a broad range of Asymmetry evolution paths

subdermin.name: Forsaken Touch
subdermin.effect: Physical contact has a degrading or corrosive effect on matter; precise control requires training

subdermin.name: Radioactive Anatomy
subdermin.effect: Internal biology emits low-level radiation; provides passive area deterrence and interacts uniquely with certain energy types

subdermin.name: Terrestrial Knowledge
subdermin.effect: Innate deep awareness of geological and subterranean environments; cannot become lost underground

subdermin.name: Living Planet Merge
subdermin.effect: Temporary physical integration with planetary matter — merge with stone, earth, or natural underground formations

seraph.name: Antimatter Wings
seraph.effect: Wings composed of antimatter; provide flight capability with destructive potential on contact

seraph.name: Dance of Displacement
seraph.effect: Short-range reality displacement; blink between positions with minimal tell

seraph.name: Spatial Rupture
seraph.effect: Tear the spatial fabric of an area; creates localized instability affecting movement and targeting

seraph.name: Distant Vision
seraph.effect: Perceive across extraordinary distances without physical relocation; primary intelligence-gathering capability
